title: Test Kit Registration - Canada.ca
content:
## Test Kit Registration
A Test Kit is a kit or an apparatus that contains a controlled substance and an adulterating or denaturing agent to prevent or deter the consumption of the controlled substance in the Test Kit by a human. Test Kits are designed to be used during the course of a chemical or analytical procedure for medical, laboratory, industrial, educational, law administration or enforcement, or research purposes. A Test Kit is not intended for administration to humans or animals.
Only the manufacturer of a Test Kit is authorized to apply for a Test Kit Registration number. Please note that Canadian manufacturers of Test Kits must be licensed dealers with the OCS.
Please see below for the Test Kit Registration Form that must be completed and submitted to the OCS.
- Test Kit Registration Application Form
